title: randia rugulosa var. speciosa
intro: Randia rugulosa var. speciosa, also known as the "red-flowered Randia" or "yellow Randia", is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow or red flowers and oval-shaped leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Randia rugulosa var. speciosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as tea or taken orally as a supplement.
